# Issue Templates — ENOLA SEO

---

## Bug Report

**Use this template when:**
- An audit isn't running or producing output
- A file isn't being saved to /seo-audit/
- A slash command isn't triggering
- The browser isn't opening or returning data
- Enola is skipping the intake or not loading context

---

**Title format:** `[BUG] Short description of what broke`

**Template:**

```
**What happened:**
[What you said / did]

**What you expected:**
[What should have happened]

**What actually happened:**
[What Enola did instead — paste the response if relevant]

**Audit number (if applicable):**
[ ] 01–08 GBP  [ ] 09–13 Website  [ ] 14–16 Authority
[ ] 17–20 Content  [ ] 21 Technical  [ ] 22 GEO
[ ] 23 Quality  [ ] 24 Hard Blockers  [ ] 25 Refresh  [ ] 26 PDF

**Slash command (if applicable):**
[ ] /enola audit  [ ] /enola geo  [ ] /enola fix
[ ] /enola score  [ ] /enola report

**Environment:**
- OS: [macOS / Linux / Windows]
- Claude Code version: [check with `claude --version`]
- Business model: [B2C local / B2B multi-location]
- Context file present: [Yes (BUSINESS_CONTEXT.md exists) / No (first session)]

**Any error messages:**
[Paste here or "none"]

**Steps to reproduce:**
1.
2.
3.
```

---

## Feature Request

**Use this template when:**
- You want a new audit added
- You want a new slash command
- You want support for a new business type or industry
- You want a new output format
- Something works but could work better

---

**Title format:** `[FEATURE] Short description of what you want`

**Template:**

```
**What you want:**
[Describe the feature in one clear sentence]

**Why it matters:**
[What problem does this solve? What does it unlock?]

**Business type this helps:**
[ ] B2C local (plumber, HVAC, etc.)
[ ] B2B multi-location
[ ] Agency (running audits for clients)
[ ] All of the above

**What it would look like:**
[If you have an idea for how it should work — sketch it here.
Not required, but helpful.]

**Related audits (if applicable):**
[Which of the 26 audits does this touch, or is this a new one?]

**Priority (your opinion):**
[ ] Nice to have  [ ] Would use it  [ ] Need this to use the tool
```
